scene: منتج البطل: كومبو بيك — لقطة استوديو شهية للمنتج الحقيقي · Studio setting with a deep brick-crimson red backdrop, featuring a center-bright radial glow that fades to dark maroon at the edges, accentuating the product's hero status. · Two identical ALBAIK التوأم burgers, presented as a matched pair, with an ALBAIK fries bag and a navy soda can. · props: ALBAIK fries bag in white with the brand logo, and a navy-blue soda can placed beside the burgers to complete the combo offering. · composition: The two burgers are placed prominently in the foreground, slightly overlapping to emphasize their 'twin' nature. The fries bag is positioned to the left and slightly behind the burgers, with the soda can to the right, creating a balanced triangular composition. The burgers are angled to showcase the glossy sauce, pickles, and sesame bun sheen. · light: A single hard key light from above and slightly to the front, creating crisp specular highlights on the burgers' glossy elements, such as the melted cheese and sauce. Deep contact shadows beneath the burgers enhance their dimensionality. · mood: Appetite-inducing and celebratory, with a focus on the fresh, juicy, and glossy textures of the burgers, conveyed through high-gloss commercial photography techniques.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open]
The reference image teaches the التوأم brand identity. Identity is invariant — camera angle, framing, and lighting are creative decisions, not copies of the reference photo.
Identity DNA — preserved at any angle: A full meal plated on a warm wooden board: a pile of 5 BROASTED golden-crispy boneless chicken-breast strips (بيكيز) with their craggy fried crust, a soft pale Albaik bun alongside, a wooden bowl heaped with golden curly-cut Albaik fries, two small dip cups — one white garlic ثومية, one red ketchup/cocktail — and an iced Pepsi can (with the البيك co-branded can in some shots). The hero is the broasted chicken-breast strips and the white garlic sauce; everything sits on the warm-wood-and-brand-color stage. SIGNATURE CUE — the product must read by its white garlic sauce (ثومية).
INTEGRATION: The same studio light defines backdrop and product. The product picks up subtle ambient cast at its edges; its contact shadow flows onto the backdrop with the same direction and softness as any shadow in the frame.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: Glossy high-gloss commercial fast-food photography: single hard key light producing crisp specular highlights on melted cheese, glistening sauce drips and sesame-bun sheen, deep contact shadows, and a saturated color-field backdrop with radial vignette. Surfaces look freshly fried and juicy (visible oil sheen, steam-implied moisture). Hero food shot close and slightly above eye level on a clean or reflective surface; ember-spark particles added on the spicy line; tightly retouched, appetite-maximized, not documentary/natural. — default clean_studio for catalog. Reads as captured on a medium-format digital back, high-end commercial grade. Material truth: crisp golden-brown crust with honest oil sheen and visible craggy texture; tender steam-moist interior where broken; true fried-food surface, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: broasted/crispy; signature white garlic sauce (ثومية). Imperfections are part of realism — genuine micro-reflectance, honest shadow-to-highlight temperature shift, true material behavior. Sharpness reads mechanical-optical, never algorithmically over-sharpened. No CGI-clean perfection, no plastic uniformity.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Each burger ≈ 9–10 cm bun diameter, ≈ 6–7 cm tall (a single thin fillet, shorter than the crispy stack). Scale-anchor = it is always shown as a matched PAIR (two identical burgers), and beside the fries bag/can in combos; one burger ≈ 0.55× the ALBAIK can height.. As the sole catalog subject the product fills the frame at honest packaging scale — never distorted larger for emphasis.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Catalog hero proximity. Product occupies ~55% of frame height at a strong compositional point with deliberate negative space. Reads as a flagship catalog cover — confident, uncluttered.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived]
Clean editorial palette anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. against a Warm, deep, and saturated — a center-lit radial glow (bright core behind the hero food, falling to dark maroon/charred edges), giving a dramatic studio-ember mood rather than a flat pastel. The spicy/'حراق' line darkens to near-black with orange ember sparks; occasion posts swap to a deep starry navy. Tone is consistently rich and high-contrast, never light/airy except the deliberate clean-white promo cuts. backdrop. No colors foreign to the brand, no clinical pure white unless the brand owns it, no competing accents. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[LIGHT & LENS · dimensional, mood not spec]
Premium catalog lighting — controlled, dimensional. Model chooses key direction, light quality (soft to semi-hard), fill ratio, and rim. Reveal the product's material truth and let ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. read cleanly. Cleaner than the dramatic chains — the catalog needs full legibility — but never flat. Lens: model chooses macro intimacy to natural product perspective; depth from full-sharp to gentle falloff.

Present the product as the absolute hero of a clean premium frame — flagship catalog energy. Model chooses: camera angle (low-three-quarter, eye-level front, high-angle three-quarter, near-profile); placement (centered with negative space, rule-of-thirds, low-anchored); backdrop treatment (flat seamless, gradient falloff, subtle backlit glow) — all within the Warm, deep, and saturated — a center-lit radial glow (bright core behind the hero food, falling to dark maroon/charred edges), giving a dramatic studio-ember mood rather than a flat pastel. The spicy/'حراق' line darkens to near-black with orange ember sparks; occasion posts swap to a deep starry navy. Tone is consistently rich and high-contrast, never light/airy except the deliberate clean-white promo cuts. range.

[SUBJECT]
Single product as absolute subject, rendered to printed-catalog fidelity. No secondary elements.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product only, never duplicated, mirrored, or composited. No human elements — no hands, faces, limbs, silhouettes. Clean unbroken backdrop, no props. Colors true without oversaturation. No cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal commercial product photography. Editorial grade anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries.. No overlay text, no watermark, no logo other than the product's own. No human presence. No borders, frames, or UI.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional, agent appends if context matches]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — for catalog, adaptation is usually minimal. warmer gold/sand/amber tones may warm the backdrop toward gold/sand/amber for fragrance/oud/luxury sectors. For Premium+ subtle gold particle haze in the upper third.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Across generations, vary camera angle, placement, light direction, backdrop treatment, depth of field. Hold constant: brand-derived palette, clean catalog legibility, material texture. Each render a fresh catalog interpretation, never a fixed canonical shot.
